name: core-codex
description: Codex port of the core baseline. Ships the judge-hook (PreToolUse rules engine that escalates via codex exec), the writing-guard (PostToolUse AI-tells guard), the research-nudge (Stop hook that nudges verification of hedged factual claims), and the core guidelines for ~/.codex/AGENTS.md. /core-codex:setup seeds ~/.codex/judge-rules.json and writes the guidelines block.

interface.shortDescription: Judge-hook, writing-guard, research-nudge, and core guidelines for Codex.
